verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Hallelujah, I'm walking with the King; Praise His Holy Name, He's everyday the same.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Oh hallelujah, I'm walking with the King; Everyday I am walking with the King.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Oh the devil he don't like it but I'm walking with the King; Praise His Holy Name, He's everyday the same.

verse.name: v4
